# Resource registration and attachment to entities.

# Setup: galaxy and planet
exec orbiter galaxy add acme-corp
exec orbiter planet add payments-api --galaxy acme-corp

# Register a resource
exec orbiter resource add git-tool --role tool --brand git
stdout 'resource.*git-tool.*registered'
stdout 'tool/git'

# Attach resource to planet
exec orbiter attach git-tool payments-api
stdout 'attached'

# Survey planet now shows 1 resource
exec orbiter survey payments-api
stdout 'resources.*1'

# Register and attach a second resource
exec orbiter resource add go-runtime --role runtime --brand golang
exec orbiter attach go-runtime payments-api

exec orbiter survey payments-api
stdout 'resources.*2'

# Scan reflects attached resources (status unverified — no integration loaded)
exec orbiter scan payments-api
stdout 'tool/git'
stdout 'runtime/go'
